content_body: We absolutely loved our time here - the view is amazing! We ate on the deck every meal, made a fire every night, had morning coffee and yoga on the deck, and really enjoyed the open living to the amazing view. We hiked, went fishing at Carter Cay, and rented a pontoon boat at Lake Blue Ridge Marina for the day. It was a lovely trip and my kids would like to move here, so thanks for that!!! We will be back!
title: Wonderful Blue Ridge Family Getaway
